title: スプリンターズSの後に・カワイイ！

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Cute Curren Chan!
Cute Curren Chan!
Cute Curren Chan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It truly is a sight to behold. Everyone is offering
their praise to the newly-crowned queen!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Everyone...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for cheering for me! ♪ Thank you for
your love! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: My cuteness... really made everyone happy. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the purest smile I've ever seen from her. Here,
standing at the top, she is finally satisfied...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Grrrrr!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can't believe I lost!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe, yup. And I'm the one who beat you. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Nghhh! You're gonna smile and rub it in, huh?!
This is unbearable!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Now, now. We're all frustrated, ya know!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
But I reckon that was a great race... I had such a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! It was the most exciting race I've ever run!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: The Cutie ♪ Derby became such a hot topic!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure loads more people will be paying
attention to sprints now. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! So that's why you look so happy.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
It's not just because you won. That's the sense I'm
getting, at least... Am I wrong?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: ...Hmm. I dunno. But one thing I can say is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: "Cuteness" really is the absolute best... ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Welp, I'm off! ♪ I've gotta share these feelings
right away!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Brooooo!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Siiiis!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hey! So, was I—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're the best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You're the best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curren Chan ends up getting so many new
followers and likes that if you lined them up, they
would stretch across the entire galaxy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She is the number one trending topic across all
social media platforms, making clear her victory
in the Cute ♪ Derby to all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how Curren Chan has become the most
beloved runner!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But who is it that loves me the most?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just kidding! I know it's you, Big Bro! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just kidding! I know it's you, Big Sis! ♪
